name: @quoin/tokens-fluent
description: Microsoft Fluent 2 (web light) palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Fluent 2 'web' light theme. Built from Fluent's global ramp (gray-0..gray-160 over 16 steps in the Web theme) plus communication-blue accent. Segoe UI is proprietary to Microsoft; referenced by family name only.
